steps.title: Use the example requirement
steps.content: The goal is not just to say that Ballard blended traditions. It asks for an example of how one composition blends Western classical music with Native musical traditions, so the best sentence must name details from both traditions in the same work rather than summarize Ballard's career or reputation.

steps.title: Separate claims from examples
steps.content: Choice A gives a broad reputation claim. Choice B says Pan Indian Rhythms blends traditions but does not show how. Choice C adds an unsupported claim about many works and still lacks concrete details. The remaining choice names a classical form and Ute notched sticks in one composition, directly using the notes and satisfying the requested example. The answer is D.
